# Milano Sensual Congress 2026

The official knowledge base for the Milano Sensual Congress 2026 website.

## Quick Links
- **Full Documentation**: [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) - Comprehensive site structure and content details.
- **English Site**: https://milanosensualcongress.com/
- **Italian Site**: https://milanosensualcongress.com/it/

## Event Summary
- **Name**: Milano Sensual Congress 2026
- **Dates**: November 20-22, 2026
- **Location**: Devero Hotel & Spa, Cavenago di Brianza (MB), Italy
- **Focus**: Bachata Sensual, International Artists, Workshops, Social Parties

## Site Map (AI Context)
- [Milano Sensual Congress 2026 | Bachata Congress Italy & Bachata Sensual Congress](index.html): The official Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (Nov 20-22). The #1 Bachata Congress in Italy and premier Bachata Sensual Congress. Join World-class artists in Milan.
- [Milano Sensual Congress 2026 | Il Migliore dei Congressi Bachata 2026 Italia](it/index.html): Partecipa al Milano Sensual Congress (20-22 Nov), l'evento imperdibile tra i congressi bachata 2026 in Italia. Artisti internazionali e feste esclusive a Milano.
- [Milano Sensual Congress Spring | Congresso Bachata Italia](it/spring/index.html): Partecipa al Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition (15-17 Maggio 2026). Una celebrazione floreale della Bachata a Milano. Il miglior congresso primaverile di Bachata Sensual in Italia.
- [Milano Sensual Congress Spring | Bachata Congress Italy](spring/index.html): Join the Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition (May 15-17, 2026). A floral celebration of Bachata in Milan. The best Spring Bachata Sensual Congress in Italy.
- [International Bachata Artists Lineup 2026 | Milano Sensual Congress](artists.html): Experience a world-class lineup at the International Milano Sensual Congress. Featuring Gero y Migle, Klaus y Ros, and more top Bachata Sensual artists teaching workshops and performing in Milan.
- [Lineup Artisti Bachata 2026 | Milano Sensual Congress](it/artists.html): Scopri la lineup di classe mondiale al Milano Sensual Congress. Con Gero y Migle, Klaus y Ros, e altri top artisti di Bachata Sensual che terranno workshop e show a Milano.
- [Artisti | Milano Sensual Spring Edition](it/spring/artists.html): Incontra i maestri internazionali di Bachata Sensual protagonisti del Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition. Con Melvin y Gatica, Irene y Tomas, e altri artisti.
- [Artists | Milano Sensual Spring Edition](spring/artists.html): Meet the international Bachata Sensual masters headlining the Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition. Featuring Melvin y Gatica, Irene y Tomas, and more.
- [Biglietti | Milano Sensual Spring Edition](it/spring/tickets.html): Acquista il tuo Full Pass per il Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition. Workshop e serate con i migliori artisti di Bachata al mondo a Milano.
- [Biglietti e Prezzi 2026 | Milano Sensual Congress](it/tickets.html): Acquista i tuoi biglietti per il Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Scegli tra Full Pass, Party Pass e Day Pass. Assicurati il tuo posto al miglior prezzo oggi.
- [Tickets | Milano Sensual Spring Edition](spring/tickets.html): Get your Full Pass for the Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition. Workshops and parties with the world's best Bachata artists in Milan.
- [International Bachata Congress Tickets | Milano Sensual Congress 2026](tickets.html): Buy tickets for the top International Bachata Congress in Italy. Get your Full Pass for Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Best prices for the premier Bachata festival in Milan.
- [Official Congress Hotel | International Bachata Festival Venue](hotel.html): Book your stay at Devero Hotel & Spa, the official venue for Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Luxury accommodation with direct access to dance floors and spa facilities.
- [Hotel Ufficiale e Alloggi | Milano Sensual Congress 2026](it/hotel.html): Prenota il tuo soggiorno al Devero Hotel, la sede ufficiale del Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Camere di lusso, spa e servizi esclusivi per un'esperienza indimenticabile.
- [Sede & Hotel | Milano Sensual Spring Edition](it/spring/hotel.html): Prenota il tuo soggiorno all'Hotel Le Favaglie, l'hotel ufficiale 4 stelle superior per il Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition. Tariffe esclusive e servizi premium per i ballerini.
- [Venue & Hotel | Milano Sensual Spring Edition](spring/hotel.html): Book your stay at Hotel Le Favaglie, the official 4-star superior hotel for Milano Sensual Congress Spring Edition. Exclusive rates and premium amenities for dancers.

Scopri perché Milano Sensual, Bachaturo e altri sono gli eventi imperdibili di quest'anno.
